zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行
zh.content:
价格当前运行在0.1616附近，整体维持在20日均线之上，短期呈现温和上行结构，但上方0.1629压制明显，市场进入窄幅整理阶段

MACD柱状维持微正值，动能略有改善但强度有限，RSI缺失导致超买超卖判断受限，短期更多依赖均线与价格结构确认方向偏震荡为主

下方支撑位关注0.1602与20日均线0.1588区域，若失守可能回测更低震荡区间；上方阻力集中在0.1629，突破后有望测试0.1650一线

操作上建议维持低吸高抛思路，在支撑区分批布局多单，接近0.1629压力位逐步止盈，若跌破0.1588需及时止损控制风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is trading at 0.161589, holding modest gains of 0.22% over the past 24 hours while remaining near the session high of 0.162943. Price action continues to show a constructive short-term bias, supported by the market trading above the 20-period SMA at 0.158825. This positioning suggests buyers retain control of the near-term trend, although the relatively narrow daily range indicates momentum remains measured rather than aggressive.

Technical indicators lean cautiously bullish. The positive MACD reading of 0.0003476 indicates upward momentum is present and that buying pressure has been gradually strengthening. However, with the signal line unavailable and RSI data absent, confirmation of trend strength remains limited. As a result, traders should view the current bullish bias as developing rather than fully established. Continued closes above the moving average would strengthen confidence in the prevailing trend.

From a price structure perspective, immediate support is located around 0.160200, corresponding closely with the session low. Secondary support can be identified near the SMA at 0.158800, which may act as a dynamic floor during pullbacks. On the upside, initial resistance stands near 0.163000, followed by a more significant barrier around 0.165000 if bullish momentum accelerates. A decisive break above resistance could attract additional buying interest and extend the recovery phase.

For trading purposes, momentum-oriented participants may consider bullish setups on sustained moves above 0.163000, targeting higher resistance zones while maintaining disciplined risk controls below recent support. More conservative traders may prefer waiting for a pullback toward the 0.159000–0.160000 region before evaluating long exposure. Conversely, a break below 0.158800 would weaken the current bullish outlook and could signal a return to consolidation or short-term downside pressure. Overall, the technical picture remains moderately positive as long as price holds above the 20-period moving average.
